findings.title: 受け入れ基準：overdue / scheduled→overdue の拒否遷移テストが未列挙
findings.rationale: 要件5本文には「scheduled, paid, overdue からの遷移は不可（paid と overdue は終端状態。scheduled からは invoiced のみ）」と明記されているが、受け入れ基準のステータス遷移テストは paid→invoiced と scheduled→paid の拒否のみを列挙しており、overdue→any および scheduled→overdue の拒否ケースが抜けている。実装上は要件5本文が正本なので実装は正しく行えるが、受け入れ基準として不完全。

observations.title: contractsRelations の ({ one }) を ({ one, many }) に変更が必要
observations.rationale: 要件9で contractsRelations に invoices: many(invoices) を追加するため、現在の ({ one }) => デストラクチャリングを ({ one, many }) に変更する必要がある。実装時の注意点だが、要件内で明示されていないため実装者が見落とす可能性がある。

observations.title: シード請求合計が契約金額と一致（上限チェックをちょうど通過）
observations.rationale: 着手金900万 + 中間金900万 + 残金1200万 = 3000万 = contract.amount(30000000)。one_time 上限チェックは「超える場合エラー」のため、等しい場合はパスする。シードはユースケース経由でなく直接 INSERT されるため実際には検証されないが、金額整合性は問題なし。

findings.title: TOCTOU race condition in createInvoice amount check
findings.rationale: T-06 specifies sumAmountByContract (step 3) outside the transaction, then runs invoiceRepository.create in a separate transaction (step 4). Two concurrent requests can both read the same sum, both pass the limit check, and both create invoices — causing the one_time contract amount ceiling to be exceeded. This is a functional failure of the core business rule.

findings.title: No runtime validation for newStatus in updateInvoiceStatusAction
findings.rationale: T-10 specifies updateInvoiceStatusAction(invoiceId, newStatus) with auth check but no Zod validation. TypeScript types are not enforced at runtime in Server Actions; a malicious caller could pass any string. The domain service rejects invalid transitions, but the action layer should also validate the enum before invoking the usecase.

findings.title: Missing scenario for overdue terminal state rejection
findings.rationale: The normative text states 'paid と overdue からの遷移は不可' but only paid→invoiced is demonstrated with a Given/When/Then scenario. There is no scenario covering overdue→any rejection. The request-review flagged this as LOW and it was not incorporated into spec.md.

findings.title: validateInvoiceTransition not listed for export in domain/services/index.ts
findings.rationale: T-05 creates src/domain/services/invoiceTransition.ts but does not add validateInvoiceTransition to src/domain/services/index.ts. Existing pattern (contractTransition, inquiryTransition, dealTransition) re-exports all transition functions from the index. The omission risks inconsistency and forces the usecase to import directly from the file path.

findings.title: amount Zod validation allows zero
findings.rationale: T-10 specifies amount: z.coerce.number().int().nonnegative() which permits 0. A zero-amount invoice is semantically invalid and could distort sumAmountByContract results. .positive() is more appropriate.

findings.title: No max-length constraints on title and notes in createInvoiceAction
findings.rationale: The Zod schema for createInvoiceAction specifies no maximum length for title or notes. The DB columns are unbounded text. Oversized inputs can be used as a denial-of-service vector and may also cause DB or logging issues.

observations.title: listInvoicesByContractAction may be redundant if InvoiceSection is a server component
observations.rationale: T-11 integrates InvoiceSection into ContractDetailPage, which is already an async server component that calls repositories directly. If InvoiceSection is also a server component it can call usecases directly, making listInvoicesByContractAction unused. Not a spec defect, but worth noting during implementation.

message: spec-review iteration 1 completed with verdict: needs-fix
